isolation.flowValidatorGuidanceSection: Flow Validator Guidance: test-observability hooks (DEV only)

assertions.title: Setting a manual override propagates to the UI in under 500 ms

steps.action: Run multi-device policy denial roundtrip Playwright spec
steps.expected: Direct ≤500ms UI+PeerRow propagation measurement for set_policy_override respond.sign=deny
steps.observed: Spec includes a propagation check to effective_policy.respond.sign=false but uses a 15s wait and does not assert a ≤500ms UI timing bound.

steps.expected: Existing tests explicitly enforce VAL-POLICIES-007 timing bound
steps.observed: No existing targeted test provided a direct ≤500ms propagation assertion for both Peer Policies chip and PeerRow surfaces.

evidence.consoleErrors: none surfaced in Playwright/Vitest command output
evidence.network: relay-backed runtime path exercised via ws://127.0.0.1:8194 in Playwright spec

assertions.issues: Direct contract timing requirement (≤500ms UI propagation) is not asserted by available existing tests run in this assignment.

assertions.title: respond.sign=deny blocks incoming signs (requester receives policy failure)

steps.expected: B sign dispatch fails within 15s with denied/policy failure; A sees no sign completion/pending admission
Spec exits cleanly with all tests passing

evidence.network: Local relay handshake/dispatch path via ws://127.0.0.1:8194 exercised by the spec

assertions.title: Concurrent multi-tab policy writes converge without loss

steps.action: Run multi-device policy denial roundtrip Playwright spec
steps.expected: Direct conflicting-write (deny then allow) convergence assertion across two tabs within 2s
steps.observed: Spec does not include a concurrent conflicting-write scenario for the same peer/method cell.

steps.expected: Evidence for last-writer-wins convergence of conflicting writes
steps.observed: Coverage validates receiver persistence/single-listener behavior, but not a deny→allow conflicting-write LWW convergence assertion for the same cell.

assertions.issues: No existing test run here directly validates VAL-POLICIES-023 last-writer-wins + both-tab convergence within 2s.

assertions.title: Self-peer cannot be granted or denied

steps.observed: Test 'setPeerPolicyOverride(... propagates...)' includes selfGuard assertion; test passed.

steps.expected: UI excludes self pubkey row from Peer Policies
steps.observed: Suite passed (5 tests), including self-peer exclusion behavior for policies rendering.

evidence.network: n/a for UI exclusion test; relay path exercised in Playwright run

assertions.title: Policy denial round-trip with runtime Allow-Once

steps.expected: Full Allow-once flow: denial -> prompt -> allow once -> retry success with correlation evidence
steps.observed: Spec validates denial failure path and policy-denial invariants, but does not execute the allow-once retry-success sequence from the contract text.

steps.action: Run targeted allow-once persistence Vitest suite
steps.expected: Supplemental evidence for post-Allow-once policy persistence semantics
steps.observed: alwaysAllowPersistence test confirms allow-once is non-persistent, but does not cover multi-device retry success/event correlation end-to-end.

evidence.network: Relay-backed denial roundtrip path exercised in Playwright; no full allow-once retry capture in available run

assertions.issues: Available existing tests run for this assignment do not fully cover the contract's allow-once retry-success multi-device sequence.

frictions.description: Assigned execution path used Playwright/Vitest CLI automation; assertion contracts for these IDs are written as agent-browser DOM-flow validations with screenshot/event-log evidence.
frictions.resolution: Captured deterministic CLI test evidence and explicit coverage gaps per assertion.

blockers.description: No direct existing test run in this assignment asserted the ≤500ms propagation bound required by VAL-POLICIES-007.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Executed assigned Playwright spec and targeted policy Vitest suites; reviewed available coverage and found no explicit ≤500ms UI timing assertion.

blockers.description: No direct existing test run in this assignment validated VAL-POLICIES-023 conflicting-write last-writer-wins convergence (deny->allow) within 2s across two tabs.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Executed targeted BroadcastChannel/policy persistence tests to probe multi-tab behavior, but they do not assert the exact conflicting-write convergence contract.

blockers.description: Available run set did not include a full multi-device Allow-once retry-success roundtrip with request_id correlation required by VAL-CROSS-003 contract text.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Ran policy-denial Playwright spec plus allow-once persistence Vitest; evidence remained partial for the full cross assertion.

summary: Tested 5 assigned assertions using the required Playwright spec plus targeted Vitest: 2 passed (VAL-POLICIES-010, VAL-POLICIES-025) and 3 blocked due missing direct existing-test coverage for the full contract requirements (VAL-POLICIES-007, VAL-POLICIES-023, VAL-CROSS-003).
